name: operator override: when both exist, the operator version is the active rule (its description, severity wins)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"description":"stricter"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: lenient, detector: x}
' > tree/google/g.yaml

printf 'source:
  id: o
  authoritative_publisher: O
  authoritative_url: https://o.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: stricter, detector: x}
' > tree/_operator/o.yaml
